screen_reader_announces_card_content.description: All cards now have comprehensive accessibility labels including type, title, summary, source, and metadata

feedback_button_announces_state.description: Feedback buttons not yet implemented in current codebase (tracked in US-FB-001)

feedback_action_announces_result.description: Feedback actions not yet implemented in current codebase (tracked in US-FB-001)

cards_traversed_in_logical_order.description: FlatList has accessibilityRole='list' with proper item structure for logical traversal

high_contrast_mode_support.description: All components use theme colors which support both light and dark modes with proper contrast

filter_chips_announce_full_info.description: FilterChip now announces label, item count, and selection state through accessibilityLabel and accessibilityState

cards.whats_new_finding_card: Added comprehensive accessibilityLabel with category, title, summary, source, author, and timestamp. Wrapped entire card in Pressable with accessibilityRole='button'
cards.video_card: Added accessibilityLabel with video type, title, summary, source, duration, and timestamp. Added accessibilityRole='button' to main Pressable
cards.search_content_card: Added accessibilityLabel with category, title, author, relevance score, and timestamp. Wrapped content in Pressable with proper accessibility props
cards.social_posts_group_card: Added accessibilityLabel with post count, platform breakdown, top post preview, and navigation hint

filters.filter_chip: Added accessibilityLabel to announce chip label. accessibilityState already announced selection state
filters.feed_filters: No changes needed - uses FilterChip which now has proper accessibility

screen_level.subscription_feed_screen: Added accessibilityRole='list' and accessibilityLabel with item count to FlatList

testing_recommendations: Test with VoiceOver on iOS Simulator or physical device
Test with TalkBack on Android device
Verify screen reader announces complete card information when focused
Verify filter chips announce category, item count, and selection state
Test swipe gestures navigate through cards in logical order
Enable high contrast mode and verify all text and icons remain visible
notes: Feedback buttons (thumbs up/down) are not yet implemented in the current codebase. When US-FB-001 is implemented, those buttons should follow the same accessibility pattern with accessibilityLabel announcing 'More like this' or 'Less like this' and accessibilityState showing selected state.
